raw.message: We made the Whopper your way. Enjoy it now with even better ingredients. The new king is you.

hook.summary: Close-up of a Whopper followed by UGC-style reaction shots of people eating.
hook.visual_action: Extreme close-up of a sesame seed bun and burger layers, transitioning to people eating.
hook.voiceover_transcript: You said the Whopper is the best burger in America

scene_flow: Initial hook showing the burger and positive customer reactions.
Behind-the-scenes look at quality control and bun research.
Fast-paced montage of fresh ingredients: pickles, lettuce, and flame-grilled beef.
Burger assembly and presentation in a 100% beef box.
Diverse customers eating with a digital crown overlay and brand slogan.
on_screen_text: THERE'S A NEW KING & IT'S YOU
audience_proxy: Hungry adults and fast-food fans who value ingredient quality and brand reliability.
